name: Jalapeno Drop Biscuits
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons cold unsalted butter, cut into bits
2 1/2 cups Monterey jack cheese, coarsely grated
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, sift together the flour, cornmeal, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. Add the butter and blend the mixture until it resembles coarse meal.
3. Stir in the Monterey Jack cheese and the minced jalapeno peppers; add the milk.
4. Stir the mixture until it just forms a soft sticky dough.
5. Drop the dough by rounded tablespoons onto a buttered baking sheet.
6. Bake the biscuits in the middle of a preheated 425°F oven for 15 to 17 minutes or until pale golden.
7. Makes about 16 biscuits.
